---

# AI··Build: Faster flow creation

### **Introducing AI··Build: Faster flow creation ✨**

We are delighted to introduce a new feature designed to help you build your flows more quickly and efficiently than ever before. When you create a new flow, you will now be greeted by a set of buttons.

By clicking on the `Ask AI to generate Steps` directly in the designer :

![Image without caption](https://image-forwarder.notaku._dGFibGU9YmxvY2smc3BhY2VJZD01NTY0M2I5MC03NDM0LTQyMjgtYTBiOS01ZGEwZDJiODNhYWYmaWQ9MWVjOTNhMDgtMGFiMC04MDU5LTliNTktZTk4OWQyMjlkZWViJmNhY2hlPXYyJndpZHRoPTEyNDg=)

On the left-hand side of the screen, a chat window will conveniently appear on the side of your screen :

![Image without caption](https://image-forwarder.notaku._dGFibGU9YmxvY2smc3BhY2VJZD01NTY0M2I5MC03NDM0LTQyMjgtYTBiOS01ZGEwZDJiODNhYWYmaWQ9MWVjOTNhMDgtMGFiMC04MDVjLTliODQtZjVhYjQ3YmUyMjE3JmNhY2hlPXYyJndpZHRoPTEyNDg=)

This chat feature allows you to add steps to your flow with ease. Simply use the `@`symbol to invoke one of your preferred services and describe the action you need in natural language. The AI will identify the appropriate operation within the service and add the corresponding step to your flow.

![Image without caption](https://image-forwarder.notaku._dGFibGU9YmxvY2smc3BhY2VJZD01NTY0M2I5MC03NDM0LTQyMjgtYTBiOS01ZGEwZDJiODNhYWYmaWQ9MWVjOTNhMDgtMGFiMC04MDdiLTg3ODItZWZhZmJhNWQ2NDYyJmNhY2hlPXYyJndpZHRoPTEyNDg=)

Additionally, you can use this chat feature to make inquiries about specific services, helping you better understand their functions and capabilities. In Short, AI will read the documentation and select the operation that better fits the need you have expressed !

![Image without caption](https://image-forwarder.notaku._dGFibGU9YmxvY2smc3BhY2VJZD01NTY0M2I5MC03NDM0LTQyMjgtYTBiOS01ZGEwZDJiODNhYWYmaWQ9MWVjOTNhMDgtMGFiMC04MGM4LWI3NjQtZDcwYTJmMWYxM2NlJmNhY2hlPXYyJndpZHRoPTEyNDg=)

### Let’s try it out !

Create a new flow and click on `Ask AI to generate steps`

![Image without caption](https://image-forwarder.notaku..png?workspaceId=55643b90-7434-4228-a0b9-5da0d2b83aaf)

In our case let’s ask AI to generate steps after a couple of existing one as follows, where in the transform data step “data to be analyzed” you can find a URL to analyzed by our tool VirusTotal.

By clicking in the right place on your playbook, you enable the AI to add the right step. In our exemple, by clicking on the button, `Ask AI to generate Steps` under `Data to be analyzed` let the AI add the next step for us and find the best endpoint for our need !

![Image without caption](https://image-forwarder.notaku..png?workspaceId=55643b90-7434-4228-a0b9-5da0d2b83aaf)

By using the `@` we can select the service we want to use. Let’s prompt the AI : `Using @VirusTotal analyze the URL from the previous step` like so :

![Image without caption](https://image-forwarder.notaku..gif?workspaceId=55643b90-7434-4228-a0b9-5da0d2b83aaf)

Don’t forget to add in the setting the API key and replace the placeholder with the relevant data !
